sys_script.name: Create Reminder from Order Item

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_bcd33e09831cc310060c5950ceaad365
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1984194_everstoc_order_item</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Create Reminder from Order Item</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // 1. Get Product from Order Item
    var product = current.x_1984194_everstoc_product;
    if (!product) return;

    // 2. Check User Preference (opt-in)
    var pref = new GlideRecord('x_1984194_everstoc_user_preference');
    pref.addQuery('sys_user', gs.getUserID());
    pref.query();

    if (pref.next()) {
        if (!pref.opt_in_reminders) {
            return; // user disabled reminders
        }
    }

    // 3. Get Product details
    var prodGR = new GlideRecord('x_1984194_everstoc_product');
    if (!prodGR.get(product)) return;

    var days = prodGR.default_reorder_days || 7;

    // 4. Create Reminder
    var reminder = new GlideRecord('x_1984194_everstoc_reminder');
    reminder.initialize();

    reminder.x_1984194_everstoc_product = product;
    reminder.assigned_to = gs.getUserID();

    var nextDate = new GlideDateTime();
    nextDate.addDaysUTC(days);

    reminder.next_reminder_date = nextDate;
    reminder.state = 1; // pending

    reminder.insert();

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-15 15:10:16</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>bcd33e09831cc310060c5950ceaad365</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Create Reminder from Order Item</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="EverStock" source="x_1984194_everstoc">7ba3e92683400310060c5950ceaad3f4</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="EverStock">7ba3e92683400310060c5950ceaad3f4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_bcd33e09831cc310060c5950ceaad365</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-15 15:10:16</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=bcd33e09831cc310060c5950ceaad365"/></record_update>
